channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: Signals: Trajectory Sampling and Triage for Agentic Interactions
item.description: arXiv:2604.00356v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Agentic applications based on large language models increasingly rely on multi-step interaction loops involving planning, action execution, and environment feedback. While such systems are now deployed at scale, improving them post-deployment remains ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, framework, large language model, study, tool | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: openlit - Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.
item.description: Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> vector, platform, prompt, framework, LLM | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Open, Reliable, and Collective: A Community-Driven Framework for Tool-Using AI Agents
item.description: arXiv:2604.00137v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tool-integrated LLMs can retrieve, compute, and take real-world actions via external tools, but reliability remains a key bottleneck. We argue that failures stem from both tool-use accuracy (how well an agent invokes a tool) and intrinsic tool accurac...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> experiment, framework, tool, arxiv, release | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Decision-Centric Design for LLM Systems
item.description: arXiv:2604.00414v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM systems must make control decisions in addition to generating outputs: whether to answer, clarify, retrieve, call tools, repair, or escalate. In many current architectures, these decisions remain implicit within generation, entangling assessment a...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, experiment, framework, tool, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, tool, model, API | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: parlant - The conversational control layer for customer-facing AI agents - Parlant is a context-engineering framework optimized for controlling customer interactions.
item.description: The conversational control layer for customer-facing AI agents - Parlant is a context-engineering framework optimized for controlling customer interactions.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>

item.title: TRL v1.0: Post-Training Library Built to Move with the Field
